task_completion.description: Verify that a new user with the login 'lobby_display' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Matomo Users management page showing the user 'lobby_display' in the list of users.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'lobby_display' has 'View' permission for the 'Initial Site' and is NOT a superuser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Matomo Permissions page showing 'lobby_display' with 'View' access checked for 'Initial Site', and ensure they do not have Superuser access.

task_completion.description: Verify that an API Auth Token was generated for the 'lobby_display' user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Matomo Security or Personal settings page showing an API token generated specifically for the 'lobby_display' user.

task_completion.description: Verify that an HTML file is created at /home/ga/lobby_widget.html.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal showing the file `/home/ga/lobby_widget.html` being edited or saved.

task_completion.description: Verify that the HTML file contains an iframe for the 'Real-time Visitor Map' widget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of `/home/ga/lobby_widget.html` and verify it contains an `<iframe>` tag with a `src` attribute pointing to the Matomo widget URL for the Real-time Visitor Map.

task_completion.description: Verify that the API token is appended to the widget URL in the HTML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the iframe `src` URL in the HTML file and verify it includes the parameter `&token_auth=` followed by the generated alphanumeric token.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Matomo web interface to configure the user and token.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show navigation through the Matomo admin dashboard (Users, Permissions, Security) rather than direct database manipulation or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the token in the HTML file appears to be a genuine Matomo token.
integrity.visual_evidence: The token appended to `&token_auth=` should be a 32-character alphanumeric string, matching the one generated in the Matomo interface if visible.

integrity.description: Verify the HTML file was actually saved to the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal should show evidence that the file was saved to `/home/ga/lobby_widget.html`, not just typed into an unsaved buffer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating user 'lobby_display' with 'View' permission on 'Initial Site'. The user must NOT be a Superuser, as superuser tokens are not allowed for embedded widgets. An API token must be generated for this user. The HTML file at /home/ga/lobby_widget.html must contain an iframe for the 'Real-time Visitor Map' widget. The iframe URL must include the parameter '&token_auth=YOUR_TOKEN' using the generated token.
